recommended.name: A Minor Pentatonic
recommended.description: Safe over any Am chord. Blues and rock staple.

recommended.name: A Dorian
recommended.description: Add the F# for a jazzier, funkier sound.

recommended.name: A Natural Minor
recommended.description: Classic minor sound. Works over Am, F, C, G.

recommended.name: A Natural Minor / C Major
recommended.description: One scale covers all 4 chords. Relative major/minor.

recommended.name: A Dorian
recommended.description: Funkier colour. Avoid F# when F chord is playing.

recommended.name: G Mixolydian
recommended.description: Bluesy major sound over the G chord. The b7 (F) gives it edge.

recommended.name: Major Pentatonic
recommended.description: Works over most major chord progressions.

recommended.name: Minor Pentatonic
recommended.description: Works over most minor chord progressions.

recommended.name: G Mixolydian
recommended.description: Bluesy major sound. The b7 (F) gives it edge over dominant chords.
